mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY VA LEFT JOIN TBL_ORGAN O ON VA.Volun_Act_Organ_No = O.Organ_No
1 = 1
AND SYSDATE < VA.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin
AND SYSDATE BETWEEN VA.Volun_Act_Recru_Begin AND VA.Volun_Act_Recru_End
AND SYSDATE > VA.Volun_Act_Recru_End AND SYSDATE < VA.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin
AND SYSDATE BETWEEN VA.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin AND VA.Volun_Act_Proc_End
AND SYSDATE > VA.Volun_Act_Proc_End
AND VA.Volun_Act_Proc_End >= TO_DATE(#{volunActProcBegin}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND VA.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin <= TO_DATE(#{volunActProcEnd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND ( VA.Volun_Act_Title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR O.Organ_Name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
OR VA.Volun_Act_No = #{keyword}
)
